heading: Duty to maintain corporate status
label: 220309 Duty to maintain corporate status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of the District of Columbia or a State.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22030936:1216 (last sentence)., (last sentence), .Oct. 20, 1978Pub. L. 95–493, § 1692 Stat. 1647The word “retain” is omitted as unnecessary.
